incident.triggered.description: Triggered when a new incident is created and enters a triggered state

incident.acknowledged.description: Triggered when an incident is acknowledged by a responder

incident.unacknowledged.description: Triggered when an incident acknowledgement times out or is manually removed

incident.resolved.description: Triggered when an incident is resolved

incident.escalated.description: Triggered when an incident is escalated to the next level in the escalation policy

incident.delegated.description: Triggered when an incident is delegated to another escalation policy

incident.annotated.description: Triggered when a note is added to an incident

incident.priority_updated.description: Triggered when the priority of an incident is changed

incident.reassigned.description: Triggered when an incident is reassigned to a different user or escalation policy

incident.reopened.description: Triggered when a resolved incident is reopened

incident.responder.added.description: Triggered when a responder is added to an incident

incident.responder.replied.description: Triggered when a responder replies to an incident responder request

incident.status_update_published.description: Triggered when a status update is published on an incident

incident.conference_bridge.updated.description: Triggered when the conference bridge on an incident is updated

incident.custom_field_values.updated.description: Triggered when custom field values on an incident are updated

incident.workflow.completed.description: Triggered when an incident workflow run completes

incident.workflow.started.description: Triggered when an incident workflow run starts

incident.incident_type.changed.description: Triggered when the type of an incident is changed

service.created.description: Triggered when a new service is created

service.updated.description: Triggered when a service is updated

service.deleted.description: Triggered when a service is deleted

service.custom_field_values.updated.description: Triggered when custom field values on a service are updated

event.description: The event wrapper object containing id, event_type, resource_type, occurred_at, agent (who performed the action), client (API client info), and data (the full resource payload with type-specific fields)

event.id.description: Unique identifier for this webhook delivery

event.event_type.description: The type of event that occurred (e.g. incident.triggered, service.created)

event.resource_type.description: The type of resource affected (e.g. incident, service)

event.occurred_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred

event.agent.description: The agent (user or service) that performed the action. Contains type, id, self (API URL), html_url, and summary

event.client.description: Information about the API client that triggered the event, if applicable. Contains name and url

event.data.description: The full resource data payload. For incidents: includes id, type, self, html_url, number, status, title, service, assignees, escalation_policy, teams, priority, urgency, created_at, updated_at. For services: includes id, type, self, html_url, name, description, status
